description: A panoramic viewing point in Dalian, offering a full view of the city and coastline.
A wooden boardwalk nestled between mountains and the sea, providing views of the Yellow Sea and the city skyline.
The core beach of Golden Pebble Beach, featuring fine sand and clear waters, ideal for seaside leisure.
The historical core area of Dalian, surrounded by numerous century-old European-style buildings, showcasing the city's historical evolution.
A historic cultural district with well-preserved modern architectural complexes and a strong artistic atmosphere.
A seaside park famous for its unique black reefs, featuring distinctive geological landscapes.
A modern museum showcasing the development of Dalian's urban history and industrial civilization.
The world's first museum themed on the mysteries of life, exhibiting biological plastination specimens.
Dalian's modern business district, featuring musical fountains and a seaside promenade.
